Landing.title: Building the decentralized future together at YTÜ
Landing.subtitle: Yıldız Technical University Blockchain Club is a student community that learns, builds and shares around blockchain, DeFi, zero-knowledge and open-source technologies.

features.heading: What we do
features.intro: From learning to building — what happens at the club.

workshops.title: Workshops
workshops.description: Hands-on sessions on blockchain, DeFi and zero-knowledge.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Technical articles and analyses, from Ethereum to stablecoins.

community.title: Community
community.description: An active community on Telegram, GitHub and at events.

manifesto.heading: Why we're here
manifesto.body: We make blockchain something students at YTÜ can learn, build and share. No experience required — we learn and build together.

sponsors.heading: Sponsors & Partners
sponsors.intro: Organizations that support our community. You can be one of them.

callToAction.heading: Curious? Come join us.
callToAction.body: Applying takes a few minutes; any level is welcome.

hero.title: Making blockchain something you can learn, build and share at YTÜ
hero.intro: YTÜ Blockchain Club brings together students at Yıldız Technical University who are curious about blockchain, DeFi, zero-knowledge and open-source technologies. No experience required — we learn and build together.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.body1: We want to make blockchain accessible on campus — opening up a space where students turn theory into practice and learn and build together.
mission.body2: Our goal is to shrink the distance between idea and execution. Through workshops, open-source projects and technical content, we help our members ship real work in days, not months.

values.heading: Our Values
values.intro: The principles that guide every decision we make, from welcoming members to shipping projects.

curiosity.title: Curiosity & Learning
curiosity.description: We ask questions, test assumptions and turn learning into a habit. Curiosity at every level is welcome here.

community.title: Community
community.description: Great work comes from diverse perspectives. We build an environment where everyone has a voice and collaboration is the default.

building.title: Building
building.description: We don't stop at slides — we write code. We turn what we learn into open-source projects and working applications.

openness.title: Openness
openness.description: We want knowledge, resources and process to stay open. Transparency and open source are at the heart of how we work.

team.heading: Our Team
team.intro: The committees that run the club together. Team photos coming soon.

sponsors.heading: Our Supporters
sponsors.intro: The organizations that make our community possible. You can be one of them.

join.heading: We're open to anyone who wants to learn, build and contribute.
join.intro: We're not looking for experience — curiosity is enough. Find a team that matches your interests.
join.note: Don't see a spot that fits? We're always happy to meet new people.
